sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
a single or multi-message switch
record:
a greeting on it 
e.g. "good morning"

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. The switch user greets people each morning, such as friends or family.
2. Take it on a morning walk and greet people as they pass by.
